_comment_fill_in: PLACEHOLDERS a human must replace before this source works: every <OWNER> and <REPO> token below = your GitHub owner/org and repository name (e.g. owner 'qthienng', repo 'pose-deck'). The iconURL must point at a real PNG (see ios/SIDESTORE.md). The CI job `update-apps-json` in .github/workflows/ios.yml rewrites version/versionDate/downloadURL/size from the latest GitHub Release on each tagged build, so those start as placeholders too. JSON has no comments — this underscore-prefixed key is ignored by AltStore/SideStore.
name: Pose Deck

apps.name: Pose Deck
apps.localizedDescription: Pose Deck is a private posing-reference deck app: build decks of pose cards with reference images, then run a swipe-driven shoot mode on device. Distributed via SideStore (no App Store / Apple Developer account required).
